chapter_title.en: Chapter on Selling Milk Mixed with Water

text: 3981 - رَوَى إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "نَهَى رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ أَنْ يُشَابَ اَللَّبَنُ بِالْمَاءِ لِلْبَيْعِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3981 - Isma'il ibn Muslim narrated from Abu Abdullah (as):
"The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) forbade mixing milk with water for sale."
